description_long: This is a metallic beverage can with a smooth cylindrical body and a standard pull-tab top. The can features a gradient background transitioning from a deep purple at the top to a golden brown at the bottom. Large, stylized cherry blossom flowers in light purple are printed around the can, giving it a floral and elegant appearance. One side displays a vertical red and white barcode label with the text 'Made in Substance.' Another side has Japanese kanji and katakana characters in a light color, adding an East Asian aesthetic. The can's surface is glossy, reflecting light, and the top is made of silver-colored metal with a typical pull-tab opening.
description: A glossy metallic can with a purple-to-gold gradient, decorated with large cherry blossom flowers and Japanese text, featuring a pull-tab top.
description_view_0: This view shows the can's barcode label with 'Made in Substance' text and a partial cherry blossom petal.
description_view_1: This view highlights the Japanese kanji and katakana text, along with a cherry blossom branch and flowers.
description_view_2: This view displays a cluster of cherry blossom flowers wrapping around the can, with no text or labels visible.
description_view_3: This view focuses on two large cherry blossom flowers, with faint text visible near the bottom edge.
